signature_move: Product UI screenshots ARE the hero and section imagery; a single accent color is rationed to one closing CTA band.

Hand-drawn pencil illustrations carry the entire emotional layer while product UI is confined to small framed mockups, so a B2B health-tech SaaS reads like a warm printed brochure instead of a dashboard.

landing_row_name: Centered Type Hero → Bordered Ledger Grid (Polar-class)
signature_move: The entire marketing layer is strict black/white/gray with hairline borders, so the single accent blue is quarantined inside the product dashboard screenshots — color only exists where the product lives.

The brand is carried entirely by curated old-master oil paintings treated as gallery objects (corner crop-marks, framed insets), with the single sage-green accent sampled straight out of those paintings rather than imposed on the UI.

One full-bleed alarm-orange slab carries the hero, then orange is deliberately withheld through the entire dark middle and returns only at the CTA buttons and closing block — color rationed as punctuation, not theme.
A book-typeset literary serif manifesto sentence on the left is paired with a living black particle-network constellation floated to the right, all in a near-monochrome black-on-warm-greige palette.

A single thin vertical line spine runs down the near-black scroll corridor, physically connecting each floating technical illustration like a blueprint callout so the scroll itself becomes a guided assembly diagram.

The entire page sits on one uninterrupted sunrise-to-daytime gradient that spans the full scroll height, so scrolling literally walks you through a day's sky while content blocks float on the continuous sun-path.

landing_row_name: Floating Cards on an Unbroken Sky (Vovy-class)
signature_move: The entire page is one uninterrupted cyan-to-azure sky gradient with photographic clouds running edge-to-edge through every section, so white cards literally float on a continuous sky instead of sitting in bounded sections — the background IS the layout, with no dividers.

A single grain-textured multi-hue gradient plume is the page's only saturated color, sitting behind editorial serif text on near-black, then rationed down to tiny per-section eyebrow dots so the whole page feels lit by one light source.

Oversized bubble-letter wordmarks where a glossy smiling mascot is substituted into a letter (the X in MARBLEX, the O in HOW TO PLAY), turning typography into illustration on a paper-white canvas punctuated by full-bleed acid-green color blocks.

A giant heavy wordmark hero gives way to a faint engineering-grid plane strewn with rounded, slightly-rotated reference thumbnails and a floating pill search bar, turning the fold into a live visual-library demo.
